error.wrong_account: The email must match the existing SpaNET account for reauthentication.

settings.title: SpaNET Settings
settings.description: Changing these settings requires a restart of home assistant

set_light_mode.name: Set Light Mode
set_light_mode.description: Set light mode using a raw mode string.

set_light_colour.name: Set Light Colour
set_light_colour.description: Set light colour using a raw colour string.

set_light_speed.name: Set Light Speed
set_light_speed.description: Set animated light speed from 1 to 5.

set_blower_mode.name: Set Blower Mode
set_blower_mode.description: Set blower mode to off, ramp, or variable.

set_blower_speed.name: Set Blower Speed
set_blower_speed.description: Set blower variable speed from 1 to 5.

create_sleep_timer.name: Create Sleep Timer
create_sleep_timer.description: Create a sleep timer profile using raw SpaNET timer fields.

update_sleep_timer.name: Update Sleep Timer
update_sleep_timer.description: Update an existing sleep timer profile using raw SpaNET timer fields.

delete_sleep_timer.name: Delete Sleep Timer
delete_sleep_timer.description: Delete an existing sleep timer profile by timer id.
